org.apache.paimon.flink.kafka

Class KafkaLogStoreRegister

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.flink.kafka.KafkaLogStoreRegister
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    LogStoreRegister

    public class KafkaLogStoreRegister
extends Object
implements LogStoreRegister
    KafkaLogStoreRegister is used to register/unregister topics in Kafka for paimon table.

      Register topic in log system for the table.
